find.match_belief: Creative breakthroughs happen when you wire systems together that were never meant to talk. The novelty is in the bridge.

profile.belief: One stolen metaphor from technology suddenly lets an artist rethink their entire creative process. That's the power of systems thinking.
profile.working_on: Building tools where musicians compose by stealing metaphors from systems design applied to everyday sound sampling and layering

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to bridge disciplines, believing that innovative connections can unlock new realms of creativity for artists.
